# libredash semantic-models

Inspect semantic models

## Usage

```sh
libredash semantic-models
```

## Inherited options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--workspace` | string | `` | workspace id |

## Subcommands

- `libredash dataset`: Describe a semantic model dataset
- `libredash datasets`: List semantic model datasets
- `libredash describe`: Describe a semantic model
- `libredash explain-preview`: Explain a semantic model dataset row preview
- `libredash explain-query`: Explain a semantic model dataset query
- `libredash fields`: List semantic model dataset fields
- `libredash list`: List semantic models
- `libredash preview`: Preview semantic model dataset rows
- `libredash query`: Query a semantic model dataset
